everyone.name: Edith Puclla
everyone.bio: Edith is a Tech Evangelist at Percona Corporation, an open source contributor, and Docker Captain. She is a Docker and Kubernetes enthusiast who loves to create visual content. She became certified in KCNA and created a guide for others to become certified, too https://github.com/edithturn/KCNA-training. She also was a speaker at Docker Community All hands # 7, where she shared her experience in creating a Docker extension for Hoppscotch https://www.youtube.com / watch?V=uGADVJTodYE&t=14sWhy I am excited to be an ambassador: I'm excited to be an ambassador because I like exploring the CNCF ecosystems and having fun doing it. It's also rewarding to share content with the community and meet people from all over the world. Thanks to the community, I have obtained many opportunities in my professional career, and now it is time to give back.

everyone.name: Tiffany Jernigan
everyone.bio: Tiffany is a CNCF Ambassador, seasoned technologist and content creator in the Cloud Native space. She most recently was a senior developer advocate at VMware. She also formerly worked as a software developer and developer advocate at Amazon, Docker, and Intel. Prior to that, she graduated from Georgia Tech with a degree in electrical engineering. You can find her at tiffanyfay.dev (and for Bluesky).

everyone.name: Tiago Miguel Reichert
everyone.bio: Tiago is a Principal Containers Specialist SA at AWS, where he helps startups optimize their container and cloud-native strategies. With experience in DevOps, GenAI, and SaaS architectures, he collaborates with businesses to design scalable and efficient cloud solutions. Tiago also actively contributes to the tech community as an organizer of KCD Brazil and meetups focused on promoting cloud-native technologies.

everyone.name: Reham Hussam
everyone.bio: Reham Hussam is a Senior AI and Cloud Infrastructure Engineer with over 10 years of experience in cloud, DevOps, and infrastructure engineering. She has spent nearly a decade working with multinational organizations, leading global teams and delivering enterprise-scale solutions across virtualization, hyper-converged infrastructure, and cloud platforms. Reham specializes in designing, building, and managing large-scale, production-grade infrastructure systems with a strong focus on reliability, scalability, and automation.

everyone.name: Marcus Notø
everyone.bio: Marcus Notø is a platform engineer specializing in Kubernetes, OpenShift, and cloud-native operations, with a focus on cost management, uptime, and security.

everyone.name: Samuel Holmes
everyone.bio: I am a Software/Platform engineer, driven by curiosity and innovation, that I use to create meaningful, impactful solutions for society and the environment. I am passionate about many various subjects, from music to cooking, with, of course, Kubernetes and IT in the middle.

ambassadors.name: Edith Puclla
ambassadors.bio: Edith is a Tech Evangelist at Percona Corporation, an open source contributor, and Docker Captain. She is a Docker and Kubernetes enthusiast who loves to create visual content. She became certified in KCNA and created a guide for others to become certified, too https://github.com/edithturn/KCNA-training. She also was a speaker at Docker Community All hands # 7, where she shared her experience in creating a Docker extension for Hoppscotch https://www.youtube.com / watch?V=uGADVJTodYE&t=14sWhy I am excited to be an ambassador: I'm excited to be an ambassador because I like exploring the CNCF ecosystems and having fun doing it. It's also rewarding to share content with the community and meet people from all over the world. Thanks to the community, I have obtained many opportunities in my professional career, and now it is time to give back.

ambassadors.name: Faseela K
ambassadors.bio: Faseela is a cloud-native developer, maintainer and steering committee member at Istio Service Mesh. She has served as the Program Chair for the Istio Meetups in 2023 including the IstioDays co-located with KubeCon Europe and NorthAmerica. She regularly contributes to the Istio blogs, helping all the latest news about Istio reach users and contributors worldwide.Why I am excited to be an ambassador: Having done the work of an ambassador for Istio for several years now, I look forward to continuing this work officially now, making use of the support CNCF provides. I would love to provide more support for the women in cloud native community with this new opportunity I am provided with.

ambassadors.name: Andy Suderman
ambassadors.bio: As CTO, Andy Suderman uses his extensive cloud native and Kubernetes experience to help drive research and development at Fairwinds. He has previously held roles as SRE, Principal Engineer and Director of R&D and Technology. He works with infrastructure spanning all three major clouds as well as verticals from Healthcare to SaaS and Fortune 500 to small business. He is a Co-Chair of the Policy Working Group, as well as the author and maintainer of Goldilocks.

ambassadors.name: Wojciech Kocjan
ambassadors.bio: Experienced Software Engineer / SRE and CNCF Ambassador, Wojciech has 20 years of experience in IT and over a decade with public clouds. Passionate about building local communities, he's been co-organizing a local meetup in Krakow, Poland, which is part of CNCF Community. Passionate about automating all the things, building scalable and cloud native solutions, Kubernetes. Experienced with startups as well as large, enterprise companies. In free time, passionate about flying drones, solving puzzles and reading.

ambassadors.name: Lori Lorusso
ambassadors.bio: Lori has a passion and enthusiasm for working with the developer and open source community. She is a CNCF Ambassador, former CNCF Marketing Committee Chair, former Chair of the CDF Outreach Marketing Committee, program chair of cdCon 2023, and is active in the OpenSSF devrel committee. She co-hosts the CD Pipeline on behalf of the CDF with TechstrongTV. She is committed to helping open source and other tech communities grow and adapt in our ever changing environment. She is currently Head of Community for Percona.

ambassadors.name: Arthur Berezin
ambassadors.bio: Arthur Berezin is a product leader and Kubernetes expert with extensive experience in cloud-native solutions. As a co-organizer of the CNCF Tel Aviv Chapter and Kubernetes Community Days Tel Aviv, Arthur is committed to fostering the DevOps and Kubernetes communities.

ambassadors.name: Marko Mudrinić
ambassadors.bio: Marko is a Senior Software Engineer at Kubermatic working on development of open source platforms for managing Kubernetes clusters on scale. He's a Subproject Lead for Kubernetes Release Engineering, and a long time Kubernetes contributor, mainly active in Release and Infrastructure areas. Marko is also a Teaching Associate at School of Computing, University Union in Belgrade, Serbia, where he's teaching Kubernetes and the Cloud Native technologies to the final year students. Why I am excited to be an ambassador: First of all, I'm thrilled to work with and learn from our very experienced community members. I hope to use this opportunity to share my knowledge, as a long time Kubernetes contributor and Teaching Associate focused at Cloud Native Technologies, with the broader community and make contributing to the Cloud Native ecosystem easier and more appealing. I also hope to provide support to the CNCF projects to attract and retain contributors via different initiatives and mechanisms.

ambassadors.name: Yash Pimple
ambassadors.bio: Yash is a passionate advocate for cloud-native technologies and community building. As a pre-final year student pursuing a Bachelor's Degree in India, Yash is deeply involved in the CNCF ecosystem. Serving as a co-organizer of the Cloud-native Thane community, Yash regularly hosts meetups and workshops to foster learning and growth within the community. With active contributions to the Keptn organization, Yash is dedicated to advancing the CNCF mission through leadership, advocacy, and technical expertise.

kubestronauts.name: Reham Hussam
kubestronauts.bio: Reham Hussam is a Senior AI and Cloud Infrastructure Engineer with over 10 years of experience in cloud, DevOps, and infrastructure engineering. She has spent nearly a decade working with multinational organizations, leading global teams and delivering enterprise-scale solutions across virtualization, hyper-converged infrastructure, and cloud platforms. Reham specializes in designing, building, and managing large-scale, production-grade infrastructure systems with a strong focus on reliability, scalability, and automation.

kubestronauts.name: Łukasz Kirylak
kubestronauts.bio: I am a Software Engineer specializing in automation and orchestration tooling, particularly Kubernetes. I have experience building Cloud Native applications and enhancing Kubernetes by implementing custom operators and CSI drivers. I enjoy designing solutions that make infrastructure more efficient and scalable.

kubestronauts.name: Muhaned Yahya
kubestronauts.bio: I’m a DevOps engineer who applies cloud-native principles to automate complex operational tasks and build scalable, reliable, and resilient systems. I focus on creating Kubernetes-based developer platforms that improve consistency, security, and developer experience. I’m the creator of KubeUser (https://github.com/openkube-hub/KubeUser), an open-source project built to solve real-world Kubernetes access and user management challenges. I regularly share practical insights with the cloud-native community on LinkedIn and Medium (https://medium.com/@yahya.muhaned).

goldenKubestronauts.name: Martina Clemente
goldenKubestronauts.bio: Declarative scripting enthusiast. Everything that can be versioned, should be versioned! I started as a Python Backend developer and then I slowly got curious about the Cloud and automation world until I decided to become a DevOps. The tools I had the most fun working with are Kubernetes, Jenkins, Terraform, mainly in the GCP cloud provider.

goldenKubestronauts.name: Mohar Singh
goldenKubestronauts.bio: 6x AWS Certified | IAC (CloudFormation | Terraform) | Linux | Docker | Kubestronaut (CKA, CKS, CKAD, KCNA, KCSA) | Ansible | Jenkins | Python | DevOps | SRE | AWS Cloud Consultant | Automation

goldenKubestronauts.name: Łukasz Adamski
goldenKubestronauts.bio: I’m a technology leader who thrives on bringing people and cutting-edge solutions together. Over the years, I’ve led DevOps, DevSecOps, and Site Reliability Engineering initiatives across industries like fintech, pharma, media, banking, e-commerce, and more. My approach blends deep technical expertise with a strong focus on collaboration. My passion for continuous learning and knowledge sharing drives me to stay at the forefront of emerging technologies.

goldenKubestronauts.name: Chinos Xue
goldenKubestronauts.bio: SRE | Cloud Engineer | Kubernetes | Cloud-Native | Cybersecurity | Reliability | DevOps | Digital-Native
